name: Low Calorie Blue Cheese Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the blue cheese in a blender container.
2. Cover and blend until smooth.
3. Add the crumbled blue cheese and cover again.
4. Chill until serving time.
5. Serve over crisp salad greens.
Makes 1 1/3 cups of dressing. 1 Tbsp = 25 calories.
